project_name: KRINOS - Tecnología que impulsa decisiones transparentes
emotional_tone: Authoritative, precise, transparent, trustworthy, structural, institutional

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4, dashboard widget titles, and key metrics. Tight tracking (tracking-tight).

body.usage: Use for dense tables, forms, evaluation criteria, and long-form text. Highly legible for numbers and data.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for high data density.
layout_and_spacing.evaluation_screen: Split-pane layout. 50% width for PDF/Document viewer, 50% for evaluation criteria Bento grid. Must feel like a command center for evaluation.
layout_and_spacing.login_screen: Asymmetrical layout. 40% abstract graphic side, 60% clean white space for the login form. Do not center everything.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside containers (p-6) but tight margins between grid items. Expose the structural skeleton.

component_rules.general: Cardless or flat cards with max 4px radius (rounded-sm) and 1px border. NO soft drop shadows. Rely on 1px stroke (border-zinc-200) for definition.
component_rules.tables: Dense. Sticky headers. Adaptive columns. Row borders only (border-b), no side borders. Small text (text-sm) for density.
component_rules.buttons: Flat colors. No gradients. Explicit hover states (hover:bg-emerald-700 hover:text-white).
component_rules.badges: Use for status (Pendiente, Aprobado, Rechazado). Solid subtle backgrounds (bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700) with 1px border.
component_rules.forms: Drag-friendly custom fields and multi-step wizards must use clear vertical progression. Left-align all labels.

logo.description: KRINOS primary logo, minimalist icon with subtle scale of justice

login_hero.usage: Left panel of the login screen

backgrounds.usage: Alternative banner for Incentivos Antioquia 2026 onboarding/marketing areas

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Avoid light grey text on white backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_tags: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='eval-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS combined with customized Shadcn components (strip out heavy shadows, use sharp corners rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Implement 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or equivalent strong display sans) for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Add them via Google Fonts or CSS imports.
Tables MUST be designed for high density: use text-sm, minimal vertical padding (py-2), and sticky headers.
Never use generic purple/teal. Stick strictly to the institutional monochrome + Emerald Green palette to honor the Antioquia context.
The evaluation screen must be a split view: Left side document preview (can be mocked with an iframe or placeholder), Right side evaluation form.
Avoid centering everything. Use asymmetrical layouts to create tension and structure, particularly on the login and dashboard overview.
